hooks.reason: Intercepts and auto-replies to low-risk incoming messages before they reach the main agent, using the persona avatar system.

filesystem.reason: Persists avatar state, user identity, escalation logs, and runtime config within the plugin's own workspace subdirectory.

system.reason: When enablePresence is true, runs PowerShell commands to detect the foreground window (Windows only). Also reads recent git commits for admin context. Both are opt-in and timeout after 3s.

network.reason: When enableCalendar is true, calls Feishu Calendar API (open.feishu.cn) to check upcoming events for state detection. Requires feishuAppId and feishuAppSecret in plugin config.

usersJsonPath.label: Users JSON Path
usersJsonPath.help: Path to users.json relative to workspace. Default: ask_me_first/users.json

stateRefreshIntervalMs.label: State Refresh Interval (ms)
stateRefreshIntervalMs.help: How often to refresh avatar state. Default: 600000 (10 min)

cacheTTL.label: Cache TTL (ms)
cacheTTL.help: In-memory cache lifetime for users.json. Default: 5000

enablePresence.label: Enable Presence Detection
enablePresence.help: Detect foreground window for state. Windows only.

enableCalendar.label: Enable Calendar Integration
enableCalendar.help: Use calendar events for state detection.

calendarLookaheadHours.label: Calendar Lookahead (hours)
calendarLookaheadHours.help: How far ahead to check calendar. Default: 1

feishuAppId.label: Feishu App ID
feishuAppId.help: Feishu/Lark app ID for calendar integration. Required when enableCalendar is true.

feishuAppSecret.label: Feishu App Secret
feishuAppSecret.help: Feishu/Lark app secret for calendar integration. Required when enableCalendar is true.

autoAdminRegistration.label: Auto-Register First Admin
autoAdminRegistration.help: Automatically register the first message sender as admin when users.json only has placeholder entries. Set false to require manual admin setup.
